meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Scale Client Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-value SaaS experiences.
content.answer_block: Transform basic apps into premium SaaS products by implementing context-aware user onboarding. By integrating state-driven walkthroughs with Antigravity and automating component generation via Claude Code, you reduce churn, increase feature adoption, and command higher freelance rates by delivering production-grade, frictionless user experiences that keep clients coming back.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: you ship a functional app, but your client complains about low engagement. Your code works, but the user feels lost the moment they land on the dashboard. You are stuck building 'basic' apps because you are missing the connective tissue that turns a collection of features into a cohesive, professional product.

User onboarding is the difference between a freelance hobbyist and a high-ticket software engineer. It is the art of guiding a user to their 'Aha!' moment without friction. In this guide, we will leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to automate the architecture of a high-conversion onboarding flow, ensuring you ship faster while delivering enterprise-level quality.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Identify the critical path from signup to the first successful action. We map this to avoid feature bloat and keep onboarding focused.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current feature set of my SaaS and generate a 3-step 'Aha! moment' journey map for a new user, focusing on minimizing time-to-value.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a markdown file named onboarding_journey.md mapping the 3 critical steps for the user flow'

steps.title: Architecting the State Machine
steps.description: Use a state machine to manage onboarding progress, ensuring the user can resume exactly where they left off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust React state machine configuration for an onboarding wizard that handles progress tracking and state persistence in localStorage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts file with a state machine for tracking step completion'

steps.title: Generating Interactive Tooltips
steps.description: Build reusable, non-intrusive UI components that guide users through your specific app features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Tooltip component using Framer Motion that triggers based on the current onboarding step from the state machine.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate src/components/OnboardingTooltip.tsx with Framer Motion animations'

steps.title: Implementing Progress Analytics
steps.description: Track where users drop off in the onboarding flow to iterate on your design based on real data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function for my onboarding flow that logs step completion events to an analytics endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add tracking logic to the useOnboarding hook to log progress events'

steps.title: Final Integration & Polish
steps.description: Connect the onboarding flow to the main application shell and verify all transitions are smooth and performant.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my onboarding flow logic and suggest performance optimizations to prevent layout shifts during component mounting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Perform a code review on the onboarding module and apply performance fixes'

pro_tips: Always gate your onboarding behind a 'Skip' button to respect power users who don't need the walkthrough.
Use local state for immediate UI feedback, but sync to your backend only after the final step to reduce API overhead.
Implement 'Progressive Disclosure'—only show advanced features after the onboarding flow confirms the user has mastered the basics.
Use a dedicated 'Onboarding Provider' context at the root of your app to make state accessible to any nested component.
Test your onboarding flow in a mobile-first environment; desktop tooltips often break on smaller viewports.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment and use a tool like Hotjar or PostHog to watch session recordings of new users interacting with your new guide.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps that lose users on day one. By mastering these automated workflows, you elevate your freelance business to a premium consultancy level. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
